name: python3-python-socks
title: python3-python-socks
summary: core proxy (SOCKS4, SOCKS5, HTTP tunneling) functionality for Python
description:
core proxy (SOCKS4, SOCKS5, HTTP tunneling) functionality for Python
Supports SOCKS4(a), SOCKS5, HTTP (tunneling) proxy and provides sync and async
(asyncio, trio, curio, anyio) APIs.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-python-socks because core proxy (SOCKS4, SOCKS5, HTTP tunneling) functionality for Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-python-socks as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-python-socks with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-python-socks --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
